invite.default:
You're invited to join the {{org}} account on the Fix the Status Quo dashboard.

This invitation will be valid for the next 24 hours. Please accept it as soon as possible.

We're excited to have you on board!
invite.emailHelper: We'll send an invitation email with a link to join right away.

campaigner.description: Can view and manage actions, supporters, and campaign data. Cannot change organization settings or export data.
campaigner.label: Campaigner

coordinator.description: Can view supporter data but cannot create campaigns or manage settings, or export data.
coordinator.label: Coordinator

owner.description: Full administrative access. Can manage everything, including settings, campaigns, exports, and encryption.
owner.label: Owner

invite.sentInstructions: You can also share the link below directly:
invite.subject: Invitation to join {{org}} on the Fix the Status Quo dashboard
invite.title: Invite to join {{org}}
invite.tooltip: Note: Only 'owner' will be able to export the supporters data
invite.translator:
Hi,

We’re reaching out to invite you to collaborate on translating and refining a campaign letter for your country. Your understanding of the local political context would be valuable — not just in translation, but in ensuring the message resonates effectively with supporters.

The letter is structured in multiple sections, each with several variants. Supporters will receive randomly assembled versions to maximize engagement and avoid being dismissed by recipients.

As soon as you have accepted the invitation, you will be able to access the letter [here]({{location}}). **Don’t forget to save after you’ve made your changes!**

Once your contributions are complete, please notify us and the coordinator so we can deploy the updates.

We appreciate your time and expertise — this is a shared effort to strengthen the campaign’s impact.

**For security, your invitation access link will expire in 24 hours.**
invite.translatorTitle: Invite to join  {{org}} as a translator

onboarding.done: You will receive a confirmation message by email. You can already embed a test version of the <1>widget on your website</1>
onboarding.intro:
Campaigns are more powerful when many organisations work together for a common goal. Proca gives you a chance to become a campaign partner and grow your impact, while keeping full control over your message, branding, and supporter contacts.

[When you join a campaign](https://fixthestatusquo.com/help/for-partners/), you get to set up your own easy-to-use Proca “widget”. The widget includes the form to collect supporter actions (petition signatures, messages sent to target, etc) and a smart share action, which allows signers to share the action and mobilise more support.

 All supporter actions from all partner widgets count together, feeding into a shared campaign counter. That creates visible collective momentum, and demonstrates the real power people have when we act together. At the same time, each partner keeps their own supporter contact information, and there is no need for complex data sharing.

The widget is multilingual and easy to customise with your colours and logo. Adding it to your website takes only a minute, and is as easy as embedding a YouTube video. No technical expertise required (and if you need any help, [Proca’s team will support you](mailto:support@fixthestatusquo.org))!

Proca takes supporter data security very seriously. Our dedicated servers in Germany are fully GDPR compliant, and your organisation remains the sole owner of the data collected through your widget. You can monitor your campaign’s performance and download the data anytime, using our user-friendly dashboard. We can also integrate directly with your mailer system.

More than 500 partners are already using Proca for their online campaigns, growing their supporter base, and creating a stronger, more collaborative movement. Together, we can create the kind of pressure that wins campaigns. Join us!

test.title: Test your widget
test.intro: Before launching your campaign, it's important to test your widget <1>on your website</1> to make sure everything looks and works just the way you want.
test.qualityNote: Taking a quick test action helps ensure quality and gives you a chance to experience the process just like your supporters and targets will.
test.testModeNote: Test mode won't process any real actions, so you can explore freely - even when the campaign is live.
test.fieldHelper: url of your campaign page to generate a test mode page
test.optimisingMsg: Optimising your widget with the changes, it might take a few seconds
test.consentWarning: These texts have been tuned with the help of dozen of campaigners and verified by lawyers. Before customising them, we advise you to loop in your GDPR expert and if you spot an error, please contact us
test.privacyUrl: You can update your organisation's name and privacy policy page in your <1>organisation's settings</1>
test.shareMetaHint: Social media use "meta data" content, for instance the image and title displayed, and you need to set them in your website directly
test.contactCampaigner: contact the campaigner of that widget if you want to modify it
test.mode: Widget is in the test mode

utm.utmIntro1: UTM parameters allow you to measure precisely the performance of each of your action to promote this campaign.
utm.utmIntro2: Every time you promote it, like send a newsletter, tweet or post on facebook, use this tool to generate a unique link to your page and see exactly how many supporters you engaged through each.
utm.utmCopyHint: Click on the icon to copy your link to your campaign to use it in your post or mailing
